deep_dive.title: SP-CACW: Convergence-Aware Client Weighting for Selfish Personalized Learning
deep_dive.abstract: Collaborative learning is sustainable only when it benefits each participant. Standard federated learning optimizes a global average objective, which can under perform for clients whose data distributions differ substantially from the population. We study selfish personalization: how a designated target client can use peer gradients to minimize its own risk while avoiding negative transfer. We propose SP-CACW, a convergence-aware client-weighting framework that selects aggregation weights by minimizing an upper bound on the target client's convergence error. The resulting rule explicitly trades off peer bias against stochastic variance and can assign zero weight to harmful peers. We provide convergence guarantees under smoothness and bounded-variance assumptions and evaluate the method on MNIST, CIFAR-100, and LEAF Shakespeare, where it is competitive with or improves over strong personalized and clustering baselines.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: convergence-aware client weighting for personalized federated learning
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 针对个性化联邦学习的收敛感知客户端加权
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 针对个性化联邦学习的收敛感知客户端加权
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 针对个性化联邦学习的收敛感知客户端加权
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes SP-CACW for selfish personalization in federated learning, which selects aggregation weights by minimizing a convergence error upper bound, can discard harmful peers, and provides convergence guarantees, effectively avoiding negative transfer.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 标准联邦学习在数据异质分布下对部分客户端性能下降，本文针对自私个性化场景，提出SP-CACW收敛感知客户端加权框架。该方法通过最小化目标客户端收敛误差上界来学习聚合权重，可自动降权甚至忽略有害客户端，避免负迁移。理论证明了收敛性，在异质环境中能显著提升目标客户端性能，为个性化联邦学习提供了有效策略。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 标准联邦学习在数据异质分布下对部分客户端性能下降，本文针对自私个性化场景，提出SP-CACW收敛感知客户端加权框架。该方法通过最小化目标客户端收敛误差上界来学习聚合权重，可自动降权甚至忽略有害客户端，避免负迁移。理论证明了收敛性，在异质环境中能显著提升目标客户端性能，为个性化联邦学习提供了有效策略。

quick_skim.title: ComplianceGate: Classifier-Gated Multi-Tier LLM Routing for Inference in Regulated Industries
quick_skim.abstract: Large language models deployed in regulated industries operate under two constraints: compliance enforcement and cost efficiency. Personally identifiable information (PII) in user queries can reach model endpoints before the system determines whether that data should leave its jurisdictional boundary. Serving all queries through a single large model consumes full GPU capacity regardless of query complexity while offering no mechanism for geographic routing. Mixture-of-Experts architectures do not address this routing occurs between expert layers within the model after data has already arrived at the endpoint, with all experts loaded in memory regardless of query complexity. We propose a classifier-gated routing architecture that enforces compliance by design. A trained encoder classifier sits before any decoder inference, evaluating each query for complexity and data sensitivity, then routing it to an appropriately sized dense model in the appropriate geographic location. PII-containing queries route to local endpoints before any LLM computation begins, making data residency violations structurally impossible. Simple queries reach small, fast models at a fraction of the cost. Our evaluation on 600 queries demonstrates 39% median latency reduction, 33-52% cost savings depending on query distribution, and generation throughput of 122-200 tokens/second versus 50-64 for the baseline. The encoder classifier achieves 99.2% accuracy with near-perfect PII recall at 7ms inference overhead, establishing pre-inference classification as a practical path to compliance-by-design LLM deployment.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: privacy-preserving LLM routing for regulated industries
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 受监管行业的隐私保护LLM路由
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 受监管行业的隐私保护LLM路由
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 受监管行业的隐私保护LLM路由
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: ComplianceGate uses a classifier-gated routing architecture to enforce PII compliance and cost efficiency in LLM inference, addressing privacy constraints.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文针对受监管行业中大语言模型推理时的隐私合规与成本效率问题，提出ComplianceGate架构。该方法通过分类器门控智能路由，在模型端点前判断查询是否包含个人身份信息，并根据合规要求分配至不同层级或地理位置的模型，避免数据越界。实验表明该架构在满足合规的同时显著降低GPU计算成本，为需要隐私保护的分布式系统提供了可迁移的决策机制。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文针对受监管行业中大语言模型推理时的隐私合规与成本效率问题，提出ComplianceGate架构。该方法通过分类器门控智能路由，在模型端点前判断查询是否包含个人身份信息，并根据合规要求分配至不同层级或地理位置的模型，避免数据越界。实验表明该架构在满足合规的同时显著降低GPU计算成本，为需要隐私保护的分布式系统提供了可迁移的决策机制。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to -, especially work that connects or combines: S; t; c; m; d; p; privacy in distributed optimization; privacy in distributed machine learning.

quick_skim.title: ComplianceGate: Classifier-Gated Multi-Tier LLM Routing for Inference in Regulated Industries
quick_skim.abstract: Large language models deployed in regulated industries operate under two constraints: compliance enforcement and cost efficiency. quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 面向受监管行业的大模型推理，提出分类器门控路由架构，在查询到达模型前根据PII合规性和成本进行多层级路由，避免数据越境和不必要的GPU消耗。该架构在保证合规的同时优化资源利用。

quick_skim.title: Janus: a Playground for User-Involved Agentic Permission Management
quick_skim.abstract: AI agents that autonomously execute tool calls on a user's behalf raise pressing questions about permission management: what role could users play, and what role should they play? Despite many proposed approaches, the user's role in agentic permission management remains under explored. We introduce Janus, a playground system for implementing and evaluating user-involved agentic permission management designs. Janus consists of two components: Janus-Core, a modular agentic system supporting a diverse spectrum of permission management designs, and Janus-Harness, an automated evaluation framework. Grounded in a conceptual model that identifies key design axes for user involvement, we implement six permission assistants spanning the design space and evaluate them across three scenarios and three synthetic responders. We demonstrate that user input is critical and can significantly strengthen privacy and security, that AI augmentation of user decisions can help reduce cognitive load, and that realistic user behavior including permission fatigue must be accounted for in system design. No single design performs optimally across all contexts, motivating a more principled and context-sensitive approach to deploying permission assistants in agentic systems. Janus is publicly available to support future investigation into this dimension of agentic system design.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 用户参与的代理权限管理
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 用户参与的代理权限管理
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 用户参与的代理权限管理
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Janus is a playground system for implementing and evaluating user-involved permission management designs for AI agents, with modular core and evaluation harness.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: AI代理自动执行工具调用引发权限管理问题，用户角色尚未明确。本文构建Janus试验平台，包含模块化代理系统（Janus-Core）和自动评估框架（Janus-Harness），支持多种用户参与设计。平台实现了六种权限助手并评估，为代理系统隐私权限管理提供了实验基础。
